title: Trimmable Tools
body:
# Trimmable Tools

**Trimmable Tools** is a mod and datapack that allows you to trim your tools!

## Description

Using the existing smithing templates, you can apply fancy trims onto your tools. In version 2, each template gives a unique set of patterns, so there's 18 possible patterns per tool!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MJu3fF3K/images/542a2e4edb583cec24cf1686de6672b232048b87.png)

In total there are **5400** combinations of tools, trim patterns, and trim materials! Resource packs that modify the tool textures will work with them as well.
